entity.label: Shamir
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: The residence of Tola, one of the judges, on Mount Ephraim (Judg. 10:1, 2).

nodes.label: Shamir
nodes.description: The residence of Tola, one of the judges, on Mount Ephraim (Judg. 10:1, 2).

verses.text: And after Abimelech there arose to defend Israel Tola the son of Puah, the son of Dodo, a man of Issachar; and he dwelt in Shamir in mount Ephraim.
And he judged Israel twenty and three years, and died, and was buried in Shamir.
